description: API Performance (RED from spanmetrics) + Container Resources (cAdvisor) — Freeze Line Dashboard

panels.description: R — Rate: số request/s theo từng service. Dùng biến $service_filter để so sánh các thành phần.
panels.title: Request Rate by Service

panels.description: E — Errors: tỷ lệ lỗi theo từng service. Ngưỡng cảnh báo: >1% orange, >5% red.
panels.title: Error Rate by Service (%)

panels.description: D — Duration: latency percentile P95 và P99 theo từng service. P95 = 95% request hoàn thành trong thời gian này.
panels.title: P95 / P99 Latency by Service (ms)

panels.description: Latency trung bình theo service. So sánh với P95: nếu avg thấp nhưng P95 cao → có outlier nặng (long-tail problem).
panels.title: Avg Latency by Service (ms)

panels.description: Apdex = (satisfied + 0.5×tolerated) / total. Satisfied: <250ms, Tolerated: 250ms–1000ms, Frustrated: >1000ms. Score 1.0 = perfect, <0.7 = poor.

targets.expr: (sum by (service_name) (rate(otel_traces_span_metrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{le="250",service_name=~"$service_filter"}[5m])) + 0.5 * (sum by (service_name) (rate(otel_traces_span_metrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{le="1000",service_name=~"$service_filter"}[5m])) - sum by (service_name) (rate(otel_traces_span_metrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{le="250",service_name=~"$service_filter"}[5m])))) / sum by (service_name) (rate(otel_traces_span_metrics_duration_milliseconds_count{service_name=~"$service_filter"}[5m]))

panels.title: Apdex Score by Service

title: Saleor Observability
